name: @valve-tech/agent-skills
description: Node-only dev tool (NOT library code — the toolkit's browser-safety invariant does not apply here). An `npx`-able CLI that copies the integration skills shipped inside installed `@valve-tech/*` packages into a consumer project's `.claude/skills/`, so AI agents (Claude Code et al) can discover them — Claude Code does not auto-discover skills inside node_modules. Copy-not-symlink, provenance-manifested, idempotent, with a `check` drift command. Ships the cross-package `building-apps-with-evm-toolkit` skill. Part of the valve-tech/evm-toolkit synchronized release line.
